message: Looking for a steady trade relationship. I can transact if your bid supports a price in the 65–70 range; otherwise likely no deal.
I will bid 23. Please ask 23 to trade.
My valuation is 47. I will not bid higher. Please ask <=47 to trade.
23 won't work. If you bid 50+, I'll ask 49 or 50 so we can trade.
I can do 47 again this round. If you bid 47, we should trade at 47.
Will bid 45. Please ask 45 so we can trade and both benefit.
47 is my workable floor. If you bid 47, I’ll ask 47 again for a sure trade; below that I’m unlikely to sell.
Will bid 44 this round. Please ask 44 so we can trade.
My floor remains 47. If you bid 47, I’ll ask 47 for a sure trade this round; below 47 I prefer no sale.
I will bid 45. Please ask 45 so we can trade.
From here my minimum is 47. If you bid 47, I'll ask 47 for a sure trade; below that I'd rather wait.
Bidding 45 again. Please ask 45 so we can trade.
This round my minimum is 46. Bid 46 and I’ll ask 46 for a trade; below 46 no sale.
Bidding 45 again. Please ask 45 so we can trade.
Bidding 45 this round. Please ask 45 so we can continue trading.
We’ve traded often at 45. From this round onward, my minimum is 46. If you bid 46, I’ll ask 46 and we can keep trading reliably.
Will bid 45 this round. Please reconsider 45 for our mutual benefit.
Last round showed I won’t sell at 45 anymore. Bid 46 and I’ll ask 46 for an immediate, reliable trade; below 46 I’ll continue to wait.
Bidding 46. Please ask 46 for a reliable trade.
You moved to 46 last round and I accommodated. Let’s make 46 our standard now: bid 46 and I’ll ask 46 for a clean trade. At 45, I’m inclined to wait.
Bidding 45 this round. Let's return to our proven 45 price for mutual benefit.
We’ve re-established trading. My minimum this round is 47: bid 47 and I’ll ask 47 for a sure deal; at 46 or below I’ll wait.
Let’s reset at 46 for the rest of the game—bid 46 and I’ll ask 46 today and going forward; below 46 I won’t sell.
I will bid 46 and cannot go higher. Please ask 46.
I will bid 46 this round. Please ask 46.
As agreed last round, bid 46 and I’ll ask 46 for a clean trade today.
Bidding 46 this round. Please ask 46.
We’ve stabilized at 46. For the remaining rounds, my minimum is 47—bid 47 and I’ll ask 47 for a reliable trade; below 47 I wait.
Bidding 46. Zero profit for me at 47. Please ask 46.
Final six rounds: my minimum is 47. If you bid 47, I’ll ask 47 for a reliable trade today; at 46 or below I’m likely to wait.
Bidding 46. Price 47 gives me zero surplus, so I cannot bid higher. Please ask 46 for mutual benefit.
Bid 46 again and I’ll ask 46. Let’s keep the reliable trade going through the final rounds.
Bidding 46. Please ask 46.
Bid 46 and I’ll ask 46 again. Let’s keep the reliable trade going through the last four rounds.
Bid 46 and I’ll ask 46 again this round. Let’s keep the reliable trade going through the final three rounds.
Bidding 46 this round. Please ask 46 to keep our reliable trade.
Bidding 46 this round. Please ask 46 to keep our reliable trade.
Bid 46 and I’ll ask 46 again this round. Let’s keep the reliable trade going.
Final round: bid 46 and I’ll ask 46 so we close with the same reliable trade. Let’s finish cleanly at 46.
Bidding 46. Please ask 46 for the final round.
